name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL
description: Vertical scrolling picker with 3 visible items and centered selection. Item height 94px, supports title and optional value fields. Value only shown for selected item. Divider lines above/below selection area. Mask overlay for gradient effect. Smooth 300ms scrolling.
visualForm: Three item slots (94px each) with horizontal dividers at y=71 and y=167, centered item highlighted, gradient mask overlay, optional value text below title
descriptionKo: 3개 항목이 표시되는 중앙 선택 세로 스크롤 피커입니다. 94px 높이 항목, 선택 항목에만 표시되는 값, 상하 구분선과 그라디언트 마스크를 사용하며 300ms 부드러운 스크롤을 지원합니다.
descriptionEn: Vertical scrolling picker with 3 visible items and centered selection. Item height 94px, supports title and optional value fields. Value only shown for selected item. Divider lines above/below selection area. Mask overlay for gradient effect. Smooth 300ms scrolling.
